contract_claim: SSE port inconsistency in `launch_with_docker`: when `port=None`, Docker maps `-p 3001:3001` (L78-79) but the container receives no `--port` argument (L83-84 guarded by `if port`). If the container's internal default differs from 3001, the port mapping will be wrong.
observed_behavior: SSE port inconsistency in `launch_with_docker`: when `port=None`, Docker maps `-p 3001:3001` (L78-79) but the container receives no `--port` argument (L83-84 guarded by `if port`). If the container's internal default differs from 3001, the port mapping will be wrong.
